verbal_cues: Definition of coaching as unlocking potential rather than teaching
Emphasis on constructive feedback being descriptive, specific, and non-judgmental
Distinction between rescue mode vs responsibility mode in learner interaction
common_errors_addressed: Traditional teaching assumption that students no longer need instruction after graduation
Weakness-focused rather than strength-based coaching approaches
Making decisions for learners rather than building their capacity
